framework.name: Know-Your-Agent (KYA) Protocol Extension
framework.description: Extending Know-Your-Customer identity verification to autonomous agents. Instead of verifying human identity alone, financial systems would verify an agent's identity/authorization as an intermediary acting for a user. This requires new authentication methods or digital certificates for agents to prove 'this transaction was initiated by my authorized AI agent' and not a fraudster.
framework.raw_quote: Some experts suggest extending the concept of Know-Your-Customer to 'Know-Your-Agent' – verifying an agent's identity/authorization as an intermediary acting for a user.

source.title: Enabling Autonomous AI Agents to Make Payments - LinkedIn
